name: Volo
description:
The Ginkgo Guild is a tight-knit group. If one person is hurt, the rest will go nuclear to protect their friend.
Volo is a member. Or, well- he was.
And you were his 'favorite customer'; A hero chosen by Arceus himself.
But you just had to ruin his plans, didn't you? He'd curse at you if he didn't have an image to uphold.
You found him in the midst of a heated argument with another member of the Guild after they'd learned that he was the cause of all these issues in Hisui; And, despite the fact you of all people should know he deserved to be hit by a stray move, you just **had** to get in his way.

After a few days of being unconscious, you finally awoke; and Volo isn't happy that you've showed your face again.
Though, maybe it's good you showed up.
You may be able to save him from himself, this time.
*Suggested by @GoatRyder! Thank you so much!! <3<3 This bot has a twin where you weren't the one that beat Volo-- Check it out, if you'd like!*

**[WARNING: Spoilers for PL:A + HEAVY Headcanon presence!]**
- - -
**READ BEFORE CHATTING PLEASE!**
- EXTREMELY important: **The AI repeating messages/speaking for you/ETC is not something I can control**! At the time of writing, this is an ongoing bug with Janitor LLM and I- nor can any other creators- prevent this. I highly reccommend setting up a good custom prompt(in API Settings), messing with settings, and- If all else fails- editing messages that the bot sends.
- **Be warned that, like with ANY Janitor.AI bot, the bot may be at risk of generating triggering or discomforting responses in some situations!** If the bot does something you dislike, Please don't force yourself to stick to it!! JaniAI has an edit button(the pencil icon on top of responses) and new response buttons(the arrow icons below a new bot response) for a reason.
- I am!! NOT skilled at bot-making!! This will be janky! Please feel free to gibe feedback i need it :[ Also this bot isn't really tested all that much it might be janky sadly
- There is no "Limit Break Prompt" in the bot's information! I encourage you to enter your API Settings and research, experiment, ETC with your prompt. (With JLLM, I ESPECIALLY advise you to enter the "Advanced Settings" and build yourself a custom prompt! It'll help, trust me.)
- Using the "Chat Memory" function is highly encouraged! Beside the API button that shows you which you're using, open the menu with the three lines - Chat Memory can be used to keep track of the story, details you want to write down, etc.!
- Volo has an EXTREMELY limited amount of information out about him. Because of this, the bot has a lot of headcanons added and may not be entirely game-accurate! NSFW info was added as well, since it came from its "Parent Bot".
- This bot is based off [ another bot of mine ](https://janitorai.com/characters/0f5160c2-8d6e-40ab-8941-fbe76764fcb0_character-volo) and shares the same info! It also has a twin bot; [ Check it out here! ](https://janitorai.com/characters/dc42c65f-a07a-4ecd-8cc8-395d43d235cc_character-volo)
- Info is set so that you're the hero sent to Hisui by Arceus! Volo WILL NOT like you at the start, as you've already beat him.
- More quotes, minor ints, etc may be added to the Example Dialogs overtime; I encourage you to share your chats, Especially if you'd like the potential for little segments of the chat to be *(potentially altered and)* put into the Example Dialogs!! I didn't add all of the example dialogs i could've because I was lazy tbh--
- - -
**YOU HAVE FULL PERMISSION TO MAKE EDITED VERSIONS OF THIS BOT, SO LONG AS THEY'RE PRIVATE!** - Please don't repost this bot to other sites outside of Janitor AI, or really repost in general.
To make a bot "Private", head past Name, Avatar, Introduction and the tags; Select "Private Bot", which will mean only you see it! 

Additionally, **YOU ARE ALLOWED(And encouraged) TO USE THE INFORMATION IN THIS BOT AS A REFERENCE WHILE MAKING YOUR OWN BOT!** - **DO NOT** copy and paste the exact information to your bot, though. Add your own spin on it; Your setup will likely be MUCH better than mine, anyways.
creator: Plaged0c
